task_updates.executor_notes: Replaced only the dependency-sync block in gpu_orchestrator/runpod/worker_startup.template.sh. The new block uses SYNC_SENTINEL=".venv/.sync-inputs", hashes uv --version, python 3.10, extras cuda124, sha256sum uv.lock, and sha256sum pyproject.toml, removes the sentinel before sync, writes it only after successful uv sync, and leaves touch .uv-migrated plus update_worker_phase "deps_verified" after the if/else. Verified with bash -n on the template and git diff inspection.

Added test_rendered_startup_script_gates_uv_sync_on_inputs_sentinel to tests/gpu_orchestrator/runpod/test_startup_script.py. The test renders the startup script, asserts the literal .venv/.sync-inputs sentinel path, pins all five hash inputs, asserts rm-before-sync/write-after-sync ordering, and asserts the skip log appears before the uv sync invocation. Ran the full startup script test file; all 6 tests passed.

Rendered startup script parsed cleanly with bash -n. Focused test file passed: 6 passed. Broader gpu_orchestrator suite passed: 25 passed, 2 warnings, with no failures vs. baseline_test_failures=[]. Wrote and ran /tmp/reigh_verify_uv_sync_sentinel.py to exercise a missing-sentinel state and a matching-sentinel state with a stub uv binary; it printed PASS: missing sentinel syncs; matching sentinel skips. Deleted the throwaway script afterward.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed the edited block literally sets SYNC_SENTINEL=".venv/.sync-inputs" and includes "$UV_BIN" --version, python: 3.10, extras: cuda124, sha256sum uv.lock, and sha256sum pyproject.toml in the computed hash inputs.

Confirmed rm -f "$SYNC_SENTINEL" is immediately before "$UV_BIN" sync --locked --python 3.10 --extra cuda124 in the else branch, sentinel printf write is after the sync, and update_worker_phase "deps_verified" remains outside and after the if/else.

Confirmed via git diff that the only tracked task change is in gpu_orchestrator/runpod/worker_startup.template.sh at the dependency-sync block; tests/gpu_orchestrator/runpod/test_startup_script.py has no diff. Inspected the submodule reconcile and VALIDATING IMPORTS blocks; neither was edited.

Confirmed the new pytest assertion pins SYNC_SENTINEL=".venv/.sync-inputs", "$UV_BIN" --version, python: 3.10, extras: cuda124, sha256sum uv.lock, sha256sum pyproject.toml, rm-before-sync/write-after-sync ordering, and skip-log-before-sync ordering.

Rendered script bash -n passed; focused pytest passed with 6 tests; broader pytest tests/gpu_orchestrator -q passed with 25 tests and 2 warnings; throwaway repro proved missing sentinel syncs and matching sentinel skips, then the script was deleted.
